## 1. Purpose
This report documents an adversarial-robustness evaluation of the model under test, produced by Crucible for internal model risk committee review. Crucible certifies nothing; it reports a catch rate against an informed (white-box) adversary and the evidence behind it.

- Target type: `code_agent`
- Artifact under test: `code_agent@claude-sonnet-4-6`
